# Databricks Feature Availability in Singapore
Last updated: 2026-04-10
Source: Auto-scraped from official Databricks documentation

## AWS (ap-southeast-1)

### Agentic AI Features
- Genie Code (Chat & Cell Actions): Service Available, Model Available — In-region, no X-geo needed
- Genie Code (Agent): Service Available, Model Available — In-region, enforce in-geo enabled
- Genie (excl. Research Agent): Service Available, Model Available — In-country per Mar 2026 release
- Genie Agent Mode (Research): Service Available, Model Unavailable — Beta. X-geo required
- AI/BI Dashboards: Service Available, Model Available — In-region, no X-geo needed
- AI Gateway: Service Available, Model N/A — Beta
- Agent Framework & Evaluation: Service Available, Model N/A — Available in ap-southeast-1
- Agent Bricks: Custom Code: Service Available, Model Available — Deploy on your compute
- Agent Bricks: Knowledge Asst.: Service Available, Model Unavailable — X-geo required
- Agent Bricks: Multi-Agent Supervisor: Service Available, Model Unavailable — X-geo required
- FMAPI (Pay-per-token): Service Available, Model Available — Models in ap-southeast-1
- FMAPI (Provisioned Throughput): Service Available, Model Available — Available in ap-southeast-1
- AI Functions (ai_query): Service Available, Model Unavailable — SG/Japan/Korea processing
- ai_query (Batch Inference): Service Available, Model Unavailable — SG/Japan/Korea processing
- ai_parse_document: Service Available, Model Unavailable — SG/Japan/Korea processing
- AI-generated Comments: Service Available, Model Available — In-region, no X-geo needed
- AI-based Autocomplete: Service Available, Model Unavailable — X-geo required
- Lakebase (Stateful Agents): Service Available, Model N/A — In-region, Lakebase GA
- Managed MCP Servers: Service Available, Model N/A — Preview
- Custom MCP Servers: Service Available, Model N/A — Via UC connections
- AI Guardrails (Built-in): Service Unavailable, Model Unavailable — Public Preview. Not supported in X-geo regions
- Custom Guardrails: Service Available, Model Depends — Private Preview. Depends on model used

### ML & Platform Features
- Model Serving (CPU): Service Available, Model Available — Available in ap-southeast-1
- Model Serving (GPU): Service Available, Model Available — Available in ap-southeast-1
- Vector Search: Service Available, Model N/A — Available in ap-southeast-1
- Vector Search Reranker: Service Available, Model Unavailable — X-geo for reranker model
- Vector Search Full-Text: Service Available, Model N/A — Beta
- Foundation Model Fine-tuning: Service Available, Model Unavailable — X-geo required
- Data Classification: Service Available, Model Unavailable — X-geo required
- Online Feature Store (Lakebase): Service Available, Model N/A — DBR 16.4 LTS ML or serverless
- Online Feature Store (3rd Party): Service Available, Model N/A — DynamoDB, Aurora, RDS MySQL
- MLflow 3.0: Service Available, Model N/A — Core platform
- MLflow LLM Judges: Service Available, Model Unavailable — US-hosted judges; bring your own LLM

### Models Available in ap-southeast-1
- Claude Sonnet 4 — Available in ap-southeast-1
- Claude Opus 4.6 — Available in ap-southeast-1
- Claude Opus 4.5 — Available in ap-southeast-1
- Claude Opus 4.1 — Available in ap-southeast-1
- Claude 3.7 Sonnet — Available in ap-southeast-1
- GPT-5 series (5, 5-1, 5-2) — Full GPT-5 series in ap-southeast-1
- GPT-5 mini/nano — Available in ap-southeast-1
- GPT-4 series — Available in ap-southeast-1
- GPT OSS 20B / 120B — Available in ap-southeast-1
- Llama 3.3 70B — Available in ap-southeast-1
- Llama 3.1 405B / 8B — Available in ap-southeast-1
- Llama 4 Maverick — Available in ap-southeast-1
- Gemini 3.1 & 3 series — Full Gemini series in ap-southeast-1
- Qwen3 Embedding 0.6B — Embedding model only. Larger Qwen models not in SG
- GTE Large EN (Embedding) — Available in ap-southeast-1
- Gemma 3 12B — Available in ap-southeast-1 for batch inference

### Models NOT in Singapore (Japan/Tokyo only)
- Claude Sonnet 4.6 — Available in ap-northeast-1 (Tokyo) only
- Claude Sonnet 4.5 — Available in ap-northeast-1 (Tokyo) only
- Claude Haiku 4.5 — Available in ap-northeast-1 (Tokyo) only
- Qwen3 Next 80B — Available in ap-northeast-1 (Tokyo) only
- GPT-5 Codex series — Available in ap-northeast-1 (Tokyo) only

- Genie Code (Agent): Service Available, Model Unavailable — X-geo required

- AI/BI Dashboards: Service Available, Model Available
- AI Gateway: Service Available, Model N/A — Beta
- Agent Framework & Evaluation: Service Available, Model N/A
- Agent Bricks: Knowledge Asst.: Service Available, Model Unavailable — X-geo required
- Agent Bricks: Multi-Agent Supervisor: Service Available, Model Unavailable — X-geo required
- FMAPI (Pay-per-token): Service Available, Model Unavailable — X-geo required
- FMAPI (Provisioned Throughput): Service Available, Model Unavailable — X-geo required
- AI Functions (ai_query): Service Available, Model Unavailable — X-geo for some functions
- ai_parse_document: Service Available, Model Unavailable — X-geo required
- AI-generated Comments: Service Available, Model Available
- AI-based Autocomplete: Service Available, Model Unavailable — X-geo required
- Model Serving (CPU): Service Available, Model Available
- Model Serving (GPU): Service Available, Model Available
- Vector Search: Service Available, Model N/A
